creator: drtr0jan@yandex.ru
text:
Building is failed with an error:
=====
--- objs/addon/src/ngx_http_lua_headers_in.o ---
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/nginx/work/lua-nginx-module-0.10.21/src/ngx_http_lua_headers_in.c:156:18: error: no member named 'cookies' in ''
                 offsetof(ngx_http_headers_in_t, cookies),
                 ^                               ~~~~~~~
=====

It's need to use the patch from https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=9274f29acde6ef0ae667f42aa1d3f9577030441e
